texts.source:
木更津～上総亀山を走る日本有数の(？)ローカル線、久留里線の車両です。
数年前に現在の、沿線自治体をイメージした塗装に変更されました。
通常２～4両編成で運行します。
texts.translation: This is a train of the Kururi Line, one of Japan's leading (?) local lines, running between Kisarazu and Kazusa-Kameyama. A few years ago, its livery was changed to the current design, inspired by the municipalities along the line. It usually operates in 2 to 4-car formations.
